states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description:
"Alright, everyone! Are you ready!? Konkon∼♪"
From the moment she arrives on stage as the live starts, the fans' cheers never die down. She was born to be an idol, in some ways more so than Mirai or Sakura, because no-one enjoys their performances like she does—not even the audience.

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description: Mysha's stamina seems to be endless. She never runs out of breath during dance lessons, and is just as lively after an exhausting performance as she was before. During the yearly Idol Sports Day event, her team is always sure to win. And when she runs with all her energy and enthusiasm on display, the audience just can't look away.

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Fox-Eared Idol
states.description:
When it comes to SNS, Mysha is not quite like other idols. Photos of her messy room, dumbbells and various gaming consoles lying around, snacks everywhere, her tousled bed head—no filters, no edits, just a realistic depiction of her life. But that's exactly the secret of her popularity, even though she herself doesn't seem to realize it.
"I messed up again... Next time I'll look cuter, I promise!"
